creator: rodolpho.eckhardt@gmail.com
text:
When booting my desktop with the 9.0-BETA dvd, the kernel does not detect the hard disks (they are listed by the boot loader and setup on BIOS to use AHCI). Booting with 8.2-RELEASE worked fine.

On dmesg I see the following error message:
Sep 10 19:38:48  kernel: ahci0: AHCI controller reset failure
Sep 10 19:38:48  kernel: device_attach: ahci0 attach returned 6
